name: gitevo
description: Evolutionary git branching for LLM agents — checkpoint, spawn, learn, abandon, adopt, finish. Tracks failed approaches as lessons, integrates with obsidian-rag.

plugins.name: gitevo
plugins.description: Checkpoint progress, spawn parallel exploration branches, record failure lessons, merge winners, clean artifacts. evo_export_lessons bridges to obsidian-rag for persistent memory across sessions.
